business.headline: Carlsberg eyes India stock market listing; confidential IPO filing submittedCarlsberg said it has confidentially filed for an IPO of its Indian business. The proposed listing would allow a partial stake sale, subject to approvals and market conditions.

ITR 2026: Do you need to file two income tax returns? Tax department explainsThe new Income-tax Act has changed the way taxpayers talk about return filing, replacing "Assessment Year" with "Tax Year". But does that mean you'll have to file two ITRs? Here's what the tax department says.

Sensex, Nifty end higher on IT rally; HCLTech surges nearly 6%The BSE Sensex rose 261.79 points, or 0.34%, to settle at 77,763.91, while the NSE Nifty50 gained 95.15 points, or 0.39%, to close at 24,270.85.

IRDAI is finally going after the real reason behind insurance mis-sellingIRDAI is discussing a shift from upfront commissions to staggered payouts with the insurance industry. The proposed changes target mis-selling incentives and could tighten disclosure across distributors.

New EPFO Scheme: Will your employer contribute only Rs 1,800 to PF?The new EPFO Scheme, 2026 has raised an important question among salaried employees: will employers now limit their PF contribution to just Rs 1,800 a month? Here's what the new rules actually say.

AI mega deal: Why HCLTech shares jump nearly 6% today?At around 11 am, HCLTech was trading nearly 6% higher. The rally also helped lift the broader Nifty IT index for the second straight session, even as AI-heavy markets in South Korea and Taiwan witnessed a sharp selloff.

Air India cuts fuel surcharge on North America, Europe flights as oil easesAir India has reduced temporary fuel surcharges on select long-haul routes from July 1. The move follows easing oil prices after the West Asia conflict had pushed up operating costs.
Sensex opens 400 points higher, Nifty above 24,300; HCLTech up 4%The BSE Sensex rose 507 points to 78,009.37, while the NSE Nifty50 gained nearly 170 points to trade at 24,346.25 in early trading.

Is the EPFO portal working today? Here's what PF subscribers should knowEPFO has said member and employer services are expected to resume from July 3 after another maintenance extension. The prolonged upgrade has delayed PF claims, passbook access and compliance tasks for nearly a week.

Zero tax in Form 16? You may still have to file an ITR. Here's whyEven if your employer has deducted no income tax because you qualify for the rebate under Section 87A, you may still be legally required to file an ITR in several situations.

EPF Scheme 2026: What employees and employers need to knowWith around eight crore active EPFO subscribers, the government hopes the updated scheme will make provident fund management simpler, more efficient and better suited to a digital-first workplace.

Will petrol, diesel prices be cut? Hardeep Puri says here's when it's possiblePuri explained that although international crude oil prices have fallen in recent weeks, oil companies are still refining crude that was purchased when prices were much higher during the West Asia conflict.

Centre eyes LIC, PSU stake sales to cushion strain from oil crisis: ReportThe Centre is speeding up stake sales in LIC, Hindustan Zinc and other state-run firms. The move is aimed at creating fiscal room as oil price volatility pressures government finances.

Sensex jumps 579 points as IT stocks shine; Nifty closes above 24,175The BSE Sensex climbed 579.48 points, or 0.75%, to close at 77,502.12, while the NSE Nifty50 gained 169.85 points, or 0.71%, to settle at 24,175.70.

AI rally cracks: Why Asian markets are crashing while Indian IT stocks rallyAsian chip stocks slumped after reports stoked fears of excess AI computing capacity. Indian IT shares, more tied to software spending, rose as investors weighed a different AI demand story.

Mehli Mistry steps down from Ratan Tata's family officeMistry's resignation from RNT Associates comes months after he was removed from Tata Trusts in November 2025.

entertainment.headline: Yash once vowed to avoid intimate scenes. Then he did Toxic Yash's film Toxic has drawn criticism after its Ladies and Ladies teaser was labelled vulgar. The backlash has revived his earlier remarks about only doing scenes he could watch with his parents.

Then nothingRelease Date:Wed Jul 01, 2026 Summer '36 review: Set on the French Riviera in 1936, it opens with a gripping murder and plenty of intrigue. Who's OP Shah, the sutradhaar of the India-Pakistan peace letter?OP Shah coordinated a joint India-Pakistan appeal urging talks, de-escalation and renewed engagement on Jammu and Kashmir. His initiative saw over 100 prominent people signing a letter to Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and his Pakistani counterpart, Shehbaz Sharif. Here's more about OP Shah, the man behind the letter that has divided opinions in India.

Video: LPG tanker erupts into fireball after crash at UP toll plaza; 5 deadAn LPG tanker travelling from Kanpur to Varanasi crashed into a divider and caught fire at a toll plaza in Uttar Pradesh's Kaushambi district. CCTV footage of the incident surfaced as the death toll rose to five, while two toll workers remain hospitalised.

Couldn't have become CEO in India: How Indra Nooyi has sparked merit debateFormer PepsiCo CEO Indra Nooyi, in a conversation with former US Secretary of State Condoleezza Rice, said that she could not have become a global CEO in India. Nooyi's remarks have triggered a sharp debate over whether India is really a country that doesn't value merit.

69-year-old defrauded 300+ luxury hotels across India in 36 years, arrestedRaipur Police said John checked into the Hyatt Hotel on June 25 and left on the morning of June 27 without completing the checkout process. As a Mumbaikar, I am glad I am away from Bambai ki baarish this yearThe romance of Bambai ki baarish fades quickly when every spell of rain brings deaths, flooded roads, and misery in forms Mumbaikars have accepted to live with. Dubai's 4-day work week got us thinking: What would Indians do with an extra leave?This summer, Dubai government employees get to enjoy three-day weekends. But what if Indians got it too? How would they spend that extra day? We asked around.

Single blood test to screen for 10 cancers debuts in IndiaZydus Lifesciences and Apollo Hospitals are rolling out Shield MCD in India for eligible adults aged 45 and above. Own military, not India, big part of Pak's problem: Ex-Singapore envoy's blunt takeIn an unsparing assessment of Pakistan, former Singapore envoy Bilahari Kausikan said the diplomatic gains by Pakistan will do little to address the country's economic crisis. The psychology of why everyone is so obsessed with Taylor Swift's weddingPsychologists explain why Taylor Swift's wedding feels so emotionally personal to millions of fans who have never met her. Experts say parasocial relationships, the one-sided bonds we form with media figures, are normal, backed by brain science, and mostly harmless.

sports.headline: Sooryavanshi as talented as Tendulkar, Kohli, but give him time: Kapil Dev Kapil Dev compared teenage batting sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's talent to that of Sachin Tendulkar and Virat Kohli but urged fans to give the 15-year-old time to develop instead of burdening him with expectations.

Mahrez's final World Cup campaign cut short as clinical Switzerland reach R16 Switzerland made it into their fourth straight Round of 16 in the FIFA World Cup. The clinical Swiss beat Algeria 2-0 in Vancouver, cutting short Riyad Mahrez's final World Cup campaign.

Nagelsmann quits Germany job after World Cup debacle, Klopp favourite to take over Julian Nagelsmann has stepped down as Germany's head coach after the four-time world champions crashed out of the FIFA World Cup 2026 in the Round of 32, ending his nearly three-year tenure in charge.

Goodbye 21 points: India racing ahead with badminton's new scoring system The Badminton Association of India has proactively fast-tracked the BWF's revolutionary 3x15 scoring system into its domestic circuit from July 2026, ensuring Indian shuttlers master the high-intensity format well before its 2027 global rollout.
